stimulus:
The following text is from a fictional 1925 poem. The speaker is standing at a window watching a meadow at dawn.

At night the meadow lay in silver sheen,

That morning sunlight slowly drew away;

The silver into gold the dawn had spun.
stem: As used in the text, what does the word “drew” most nearly mean?
rationale: Choice B is correct because, in context, sunlight "drew away" the silver appearance of the meadow, meaning it pulled it away. Choice A is incorrect because sketching doesn’t fit the action of sunlight changing the scene. Choice C is incorrect because inspiring doesn’t fit a physical change. Choice D is incorrect because selecting doesn’t describe the gradual change.
